entities.name: INDIAN BARNYARD MILLET
entities.description: A small millet (Echinochloa frumentacea) capable of ensuring food, feed, and nutritional security and coping with changing climate

entities.name: SMALL MILLETS
entities.description: A group of millets, including Indian barnyard millet, important for food and nutritional security

entities.name: MAJOR CEREALS
entities.description: Large-scale cereal crops that have received more research attention than small millets

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of ensuring access to sufficient and nutritious food for the growing population

entities.name: CHANGING CLIMATE
entities.description: Environmental shifts that crops must be able to cope with

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATION
entities.description: Diversity in genetic makeup preserved for traits of economic importance

entities.name: TRAITS OF ECONOMIC IMPORTANCE
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that provide economic value

entities.name: EX SITU COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Collections of genetic resources maintained outside their natural habitats

entities.name: GENE BANKS
entities.description: International and national facilities that store and preserve genetic resources

entities.name: TRAIT IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing specific traits in a crop

entities.name: GENETIC MECHANISMS
entities.description: The biological processes that govern the inheritance and expression of traits

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average performance of a crop population over time due to selection

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING APPROACHES
entities.description: Traditional methods used for crop improvement

entities.name: NEXT-GENERATION BREEDING
entities.description: Advanced breeding techniques coupled with genomics for faster improvement

entities.name: HIGH-THROUGHPUT GENOMICS
entities.description: Large-scale genomic analysis used to develop genomic resources

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Data and tools derived from genome sequencing used to study traits

entities.name: COMPLEX TRAITS
entities.description: Traits controlled by multiple genes and environmental factors

entities.name: QUANTITATIVE TRAIT LOCI
entities.description: Regions of DNA associated with the variation of a quantitative trait

entities.name: PLOIDY COMPLEXITY
entities.description: The complex chromosomal makeup of Indian barnyard millet that hinders genomic resource development

entities.name: NARROW GENETIC BASE
entities.description: Limited genetic diversity within a crop population

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The science of changing the traits of plants to produce desired characteristics

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL ASPECTS
entities.description: The nutritional properties and value of the crop

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the growth and yield of the crop

entities.name: VALUE ADDITION
entities.description: The process of increasing the economic value of a product

entities.name: TRADE VALUE
entities.description: The market value of the crop in trade

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where marginal farmers grow Indian barnyard millet
